creator: ecu@200ok.org
text:
On Wed, Apr 18, 2007 at 09:20:29AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/sec,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/111812 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111812

Hmm sorry, I posted the PR with another address.
So I auto-approve my patch :-)

Nicolas
